## Type of change

- [ ] New rate limit
- [ ] Correction to an existing rate limit
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Docs / tests / tooling

## For rate-limit changes

- **Service:**
- **Official docs URL (sourceUrl):**
- [ ] Value is based on the official docs linked above
- [ ] Registry entry is lowercase and alphabetically ordered
- [ ] Added a comment if the limit varies by plan/tier/endpoint
- [ ] Ran `npm run build:json` and committed the updated `registry.json`

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm run validate` passes (registry rules)
- [ ] `npm run check:json` passes (registry.json in sync)
- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes
